返回本批次

用于从月球反射信号的开源 240 天线阵列

An open-source 240-antenna array to bounce signals off the Moon

moonrf.com 作者 hillcrestenigma 分数 85 评论 12 2026/04/06 11:22
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. MoonRF 更新硬件 Discord
  2. 一项开源通信硬件和软件计划，使公众能够通过从月球反射信号等方式连接世界各地！通知：我们已正式更名为 MoonRF！在更新中阅读更多相关信息。随时了解我们的硬件何时推出，成为第一个了解我们的信息的人！
  3. 业余无线电爱好者的新领域 从月球反射信号——称为地-月-地 (EME) 通信——长期以来一直是业余无线电爱好者面临的终极挑战。它需要大型天线、昂贵的设备以及准确的手动指向和跟踪。我们试图将其落地，通过开源软件定义的相控阵提供体验太空通信快感所需的所有工具。
  4. 开源硬件预计发货时间：2026 年 7 月。
  5. 我们的第一个套件是低成本数字相控阵，具有高发射功率和出色的接收灵敏度。它支持 C 频段 (4.9–6 GHz) 中任何 40 MHz 带宽的灵活传输模式。

Original Summary

  1. MoonRF Updates Hardware Discord
  2. An open-source communications hardware & software initiative empowering the public to connect across the world by bouncing signals off the Moon—and more! Notice: We have officially changed our name from open.space to MoonRF! Read more about it in Updates. Stay in the Loop Be the first to find out when our hardware launches!
  3. A New Frontier for Ham Radio Bouncing signals off the Moon—known as Earth-Moon-Earth (EME) communication—has long been the ultimate challenge for radio amateurs. It required large antennas, expensive equipment, and accurate manual pointing and tracking. We try to bring this down to Earth, providing all the tools needed to experience the thrill of space communication, with an open source software-defined phased array.
  4. Open-Source Hardware Expected to ship: July 2026.
  5. Our first kit is a low-cost digital phased array, with high transmit power and excellent receive sensitivity. It supports flexible transmission modes across any 40 MHz bandwidth in the C-band (4.9–6 GHz).

评论（默认中文）

infinitewars 2026/04/06 12:33
适用于车库项目的野生硬件灵活性。对 Pi 5 的 MIPI 进行逆向工程，将 5.6 Gbps 从定制 MASH sigma-delta ADC 推向莱迪思 ECP5 FPGA，再到 Raspberry Pi 是一项严肃的工程。 RF 接收器看起来像 Pi 的“相机”，而发射器是“显示器”，这个想法非常有创意。对于这样的东西来说，花 2,499 美元购买一个 1.5 kW、240 个天线的 EME 阵列实际上很便宜。

他们的独立 4 天线块（https://moonrf.com/updates/）展示了一些杀手级应用程序，例如 30 fps 空间射频可视化和 NEON 优化的无人机视频拦截。

不过，我对“代理收发器”部分翻白眼。非常值得怀疑的是，板载人工智能在十分钟内随意编写、调试和编译了一个具有模拟视频颜色同步恢复和解码功能的实时 C 应用程序。

Wild hardware flex for a garage project. Reverse-engineering the Pi 5's MIPI to push 5.6 Gbps from custom MASH sigma-delta ADCs to a Lattice ECP5 FPGA to the Raspberry Pi is serious engineering. The idea that the RF receiver looks like a "camera" to the Pi while the transmitter is a "display" is super creative. Getting a 1.5 kW, 240-antenna EME array for $2,499 is actually cheap for something like this.

Their standalone 4-antenna tiles (https://moonrf.com/updates/) show off some killer apps, like 30 fps spatial RF visualization and NEON-optimized drone video interception.

I'm rolling my eyes at the "Agentic Transceiver" part, though. It is highly doubtful that an onboard AI casually writes, debugs, and compiles a real-time C app with analog video color sync recovery and decode in ten minutes.

在 HN 中查看
jcalvinowens 2026/04/06 13:19
> 获得 1.5 kW、240 根天线的 EME 阵列

它说每个天线 1W TX 功率。因此，消耗 1500W 功率的 240 个天线阵列的发射功率为 240W。

> Getting a 1.5 kW, 240-antenna EME array

It says 1W TX power per antenna. So the 240 antenna array which draws 1500W has a transmit power of 240W.

在 HN 中查看
HNisCIS 2026/04/06 13:20
有效辐射功率。 这其中也有一定的收获。
EIRP. There's some gain involved.
在 HN 中查看
jcalvinowens 2026/04/06 13:41
我认为他们声称实际发射功率为 240W (23.8 dBW)，EIRP 为 63.1 dBW。

我对声称的增益有点怀疑……即使在 6GHz 下，你也需要一个 2 米的抛物面反射器才能获得 40dB，阵列的直径是该直径的 1/10。编辑：忽略第二段我误读了规格页面。

I think they're claiming the actual transmit power is 240W (23.8 dBW), and the EIRP is 63.1 dBW.

I am sort of skeptical of the claimed gain... even at 6GHz, you need a 2-meter parabolic reflector to get 40dB, the array is 1/10th that diameter. EDIT: Ignore this second paragraph I misread the spec page.

在 HN 中查看
mrtnmcc 2026/04/06 13:43
MoonRF 阵列的直径为 1 米，如页面所示
The MoonRF array is a full 1 meter diameter as shown on the page
在 HN 中查看
jcalvinowens 2026/04/06 13:44
我睡着了，把它误读为10厘米。谢谢。
I'm asleep and I misread that as 10cm. Thanks.
在 HN 中查看
HNisCIS 2026/04/06 12:57
我正在努力理解这里的信号链或天线架构。 如果这两个 MAX 芯片是 2829，则每块 2x2 mimo，但我对该产品线不太熟悉，而且 PCB 布局看起来像 4x4 设置。

是的，代理的东西很愚蠢，我在 Opus 4.6 上做了很多低级别的 SDR 工作，它真的很糟糕。

另外，“不能雷达，请不要 ITAR”是胡说八道。 进行一些基本的固件调整，您至少可以得到一个不错的 FMCW 设置。

I'm struggling to understand the signal chain or antenna architecture here. If those two MAX chips are 2829s this would be 2x2 mimo per tile but I'm not super familiar with that product line and the PCB layout looks like a 4x4 setup.

And yeah, the agentic stuff is dumb, I've played a ton with doing low level SDR work on Opus 4.6 and it's truly ass.

Also, the "can't radar, plz don't ITAR" is horseshit. Some basic fw tweaks and you could get this to be, at the very least, a sweet FMCW setup.

在 HN 中查看
jowelene 2026/04/06 14:29
MAX2850/2851 4x4。此外，大型雷达的东西比您声称的“只是一些固件调整”更加微妙。和 Facebook 一样不只是一些 PHP 脚本......
MAX2850/2851 4x4. Also, large radar stuff is more nuanced than "just some fw tweaks" as you claim. Same as Facebook is not just some PHP scripts...

diimdeep 2026/04/06 12:38
很酷，与星链卫星上放置的单个天线相比，完整阵列如何？
Cool, how full array compares to the single antenna placed on Starlink satellite ?
在 HN 中查看
Terr_ 2026/04/06 14:30
这样的比较会有什么用处呢？用例不是太不同了吗？

月球不仅距离 >100 倍远（甚至考虑到近地平线卫星角度），而且还尝试将信号作为无源反射器从月球反射回来，这比仅仅传输主动月球接收器可以检测到并重新传输回来的东西要困难。

How would that be a useful comparison? Aren't the use-cases too different?

Not only is the moon >100x farther away (even accounting for near-horizon satellite angles), but you're also trying to bounce a signal off it as a passive reflector, which is harder than just transmitting something an active lunar receiver could detect and re-transmit back.

在 HN 中查看
